cover: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'Salesforce Disaster Recovery Architecture'. Subtitle in white: 'RPO, RTO, backup strategy, restore orchestration, and the failure modes nobody tests'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'Business Continuity Objectives' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'RPO by Object', 'RTO by Process', 'Tiered Recovery' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'Recovery Control Plane' vivid purple border — modules 'Metadata Git', 'Backup Vault', 'Restore Runbooks' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'Salesforce Runtime' vivid teal/green border — modules 'Core CRM Data', 'Files + Attachments', 'Agentforce 2.0 Assets' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: 'DR Orchestrator' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'MuleSoft + External APIs' and 'Data 360 + Zero Copy'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'DR drill' → 'detect gap' → 'restore subset' → 'validate business process' with flow arrows. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce DR Is Not Just Backup'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Salesforce DR Is Not Just Backup'. Subtitle 'RPO/RTO only matter when restore order, automation control, and reconciliation are tested'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Logical corruption with warning triangle icon', 'Metadata rollback with git branch icon', 'Integration replay with event bus icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'TOOL-ONLY DR' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'ARCHITECTED DR' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'backupJob.schedule(\"nightly\");\\nrestore(\"Account\");\\nnotify(\"done\");', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'freezeIntegrations();\\nsuspendAutomation(\"Case\");\\nrestoreGraph([\"Account\",\"Contact\",\"Case\",\"EmailMessage\"]);\\nreplayEvents(\"OrderCreated\", replayId);\\nvalidateRpo(\"Support\", 15);'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'object dependency graph', 'restore validation queries', 'business sign-off evidence'. Footer bar: 'A backup is a file. Recovery is a controlled business operation.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce Restore at Scale: 1K vs 100K vs 10M'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Salesforce Restore at Scale'. Subtitle 'The restore pattern changes when data volume, locks, and integrations become the bottleneck'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '1K records: manual control with checklist icon', '100K records: bulk restore with API meter icon', '10M records: tiered recovery with partition icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'NAIVE RESTORE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'SCALE-AWARE RESTORE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'for (Case c : allCases) {\\n    update c;\\n}\\nresumeIntegrations();', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'Database.update(caseBatch, false, AccessLevel.USER_MODE);\\nvalidateChunk(batchId);\\nreplayIntegrationEvents(partitionKey);\\nreleaseNextRestoreWave();'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'partition by business priority', 'control automation bypass', 'measure actual RTO'. Footer bar: 'At 10M records, recovery is sequencing, not uploading.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
